visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a grey ribbed top, speaking energetically to the camera in a brightly lit indoor environment. Behind her, a white ergonomic office chair is visible against a neutral wall. A text banner with a South Korean flag icon is positioned at the top of the frame. She uses animated hand gestures and expressive facial movements to engage the viewer immediately. (2) As the narrative unfolds, the woman begins a makeup routine, holding a silver cushion compact and using a puff to apply product to her face. Multiple layers of text overlays in Traditional Chinese appear, providing additional context and variety-show style commentary. An inset photo of her and a man with a cat-mask filter appears at the bottom, illustrating her story about her Korean boyfriend. The camera remains static at eye-level throughout this segment. (3) She continues her beauty routine, switching to a powder brush and later an eyeshadow palette. Her expressions vary from laughter to exaggerated shock as she recounts specific details of her meeting. More graphic text elements and subtitles populate the screen, keeping the visual density high. The lighting remains soft and flattering, typical of a professional studio or high-quality home setup. The video concludes with a final call-to-action overlay.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 🇰🇷韓國男朋友初遇故事. [Subtitle]: 我的男朋友🇰🇷. [Variety]: 冬瓜是大學生?. (2) [Variety]: 邊化妝邊聊 我跟韓國人男友到底怎麼見面🥰. [Subtitle]: 其實我們在台灣🇹🇼認識的. (3) [Variety]: (是年下??). [Subtitle]: 那時候冬瓜還在讀大學. (4) [Variety]: 當時有璟: 全職Youtuber超級忙碌的時候. (5) [Variety]: 在一個產品的工商拍攝現場. (6) [Subtitle]: “我認識你!”. (7) [Subtitle]: “我在YT上看過你”. (8) [Subtitle]: 同一間大學. (9) [Variety]: (璟已經畢業). [Variety]: (沒看過他). (10) [Variety]: 好像跟大哥一樣. [Variety]: 啊哈~ 你是學弟齁 嘿嘿嘿. (11) [Subtitle]: “對啊對啊~”. (12) [Subtitle]: 但是以防萬一. [Subtitle]: “所以你的年紀是?”. (13) [Subtitle]: 冬瓜微笑著 我是.. (14) [Subtitle]: “1993出生的”. [Variety]: (1996🐣). (15) [Variety]: 靠邀... (我直接愣三秒......). (16) [Variety]: 對不起x100. [Subtitle]: 죄송합니다 죄송합니다. (17) [Variety]: (冬瓜比我早入大學). [Subtitle]: 他因為打工+當兵的關係在大學裡面沒機會見面!. (18) [Variety]: (已經知道有璟年紀). [Subtitle]: “누나 姊姊”. [Variety]: (超級調皮😝). (19) [Subtitle]: (璟: 瘋了嗎?). (20) [Variety]: 但當時 我真的完全沒把他當成對象🤔. [Variety]: 我以為他那種很吵很外向的 E MBTI E的人. (21) [Variety]: (平常是喜歡安靜的男生). (22) [Variety]: 這段真的很多料, 下次爆給你們聽😂. [Subtitle]: 韓國渣男們. [Subtitle]: 整個不想再談戀愛了. (23) [Variety]: (冬瓜當時準備畢業). (24) [Subtitle]: 你在幹嘛?. (25) [Subtitle]: “我一個在山下”. “我一個在那”. (26) [Variety]: 看起來好可憐(?). (27) [Variety]: (年紀大). (28) [Variety]: (大學裡面也算是老人). (29) [Variety]: 也沒什麼課 (四年級). (30) [Variety]: (我是這麼覺得). [Subtitle]: 所以我常常配他一起去咖啡廳, 吃飯~. (31) [Variety]: 大反轉故事在第二集繼續🔥. [Variety]: 好奇續集的話 請底下留言.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking, 1 male boyfriend visible in photos.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight dark hair, wearing a grey ribbed sweater or top, presenting with a lively and expressive demeanor.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist indoor setting featuring a neutral wall and a white ergonomic office chair, typical of a home studio or vlog background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a vibrant, high-pitched female voice speaking Mandarin with clear, professional articulation. The delivery is rapid and high-energy, suggesting an enthusiastic greeting. Simultaneously, an upbeat electronic pop BGM starts, characterized by a steady 4/4 beat and bright synth textures. A distinctive 'pop' sound effect is heard as the first graphic text appears on the screen. (2) A new phase is triggered by a shift in vocal tone as the speaker begins her storytelling. Her voice adopts a more rhythmic, narrative quality with frequent pitch modulations to emphasize humor. The BGM continues as a consistent backdrop. Several 'ding' and 'chime' sound effects occur in quick succession, marking the arrival of various on-screen text labels. The acoustic environment is very dry and clean, indicating a studio recording with no audible background hum. (3) The audio shifts again when the speaker simulates a brief dialogue exchange, using slightly different vocal intonations. This is followed by a burst of laughter and a sudden increase in vocal volume as she expresses surprise. The music remains steady, but the density of 'comic' sound effects increases, including a 'whoosh' transition sound for a scene cut. The track ends with a clear, enunciated sign-off, maintaining high spectral brightness until the final second.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Storytelling: Hook -> Context Setting -> Incident Description -> Interaction Detail -> Emotional Reflection -> Climax/Cliffhanger -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a personal and humorous story about meeting a Korean boyfriend while performing a casual makeup routine, aiming to engage followers through relatable lifestyle content and a narrative cliffhanger.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-engagement social media format utilizing variety-style text overlays and rapid editing to maintain viewer interest throughout a personal narrative.
